sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 213 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No. 26. 2. For orders on CMA No. 291/2023 (Exemption) 3. For orders on CMA No. 292/2023 (stay) 4. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025 This reference is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Even today, Mr. Asif Raza, advocate appears without any authorization and mere seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
